results.title: Talisker 1988, The Distillers Edition 2001 Bottling | The Whisky Vault
results.description: This rare single malt from the Isle of Skye legend, Talisker, was distilled in 1988 and bottled specially for The Distillers Edition series in 2001.

results.title: Review #2340 - Talisker Distiller's Edition : r/Scotch - Reddit
results.description: Briny sea air with a pop of toffee, fruits, wine and sweet butter cream. Overall: Talisker knows just how to draw me in and keep me interested.
